title: On the Inventor of Gunpowder.
content:
Praise in old time the sage Prometheus won,
    Who stole ethereal radiance from the sun;
    But greater he, whose bold invention strove
    To emulate the fiery bolts of Jove.
meaning:
"On the Inventor of Gunpowder." is a quintessential example of John Milton's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
